completed_tasks.name: QA parts-bin flows (all 4 manual tests passing)
Replaced CarStage canvas (5-attempt failed shadow/reflection) with simple CSS contact shadow
Dropped reflection entirely — too complex for arbitrary photo angles, no reliable approach
Built GT-style garage background: dark base + spotlight, garage door panel lines, beveled vertical rails, floor line, floor light pool
Iterative tuning: line density, thickness, door area height, beveled rail depth effect

remaining_tasks.name: Fine-tune garage background (user said 'still need to do some adjustments')
remaining_tasks.notes: User was happy with overall direction. May want to adjust spotlight warmth, floor line intensity, contact shadow, or line opacities.

remaining_tasks.name: Commit and push to main when satisfied
remaining_tasks.notes: GarageCarsPage.tsx has 258-line diff, not yet committed. Push directly to main (Vercel auto-deploys).

decisions.rationale: 5 prior attempts all failed — alpha detection unreliable for arbitrary angles, body kits, RESIDUE_ALPHA clipping. User agreed complexity not worth it.

decisions.decision: Replace canvas CarStage with CSS-only contact shadow
decisions.rationale: Soft radial-gradient ellipse works for any car photo without photo intelligence. No canvas needed.

decisions.decision: GT-style garage background with garage door panel lines
decisions.rationale: User referenced Gran Turismo garage screen. Paired shadow+highlight horizontal lines, beveled vertical rails, spotlight, floor line, floor light pool.

decisions.decision: Single fixed thick seam line at 38% of door area (not repeating)
decisions.rationale: Repeating thick line every 44px would fall at random positions relative to the car body — one landed at beltline level. Fixed position avoids this.

next_action: Ask user what adjustments they want, then commit and push to main when done.
context_notes: Garage background is in good shape — user approved the beveled vertical rails and overall direction. Current values: door lines bottom=41%, floor line bottom=41%, thin lines every 11px, single thick seam at 38% of door area, vertical rails 8px beveled. Contact shadow is a CSS radial-gradient ellipse. The car photo (cars.garage_photo_url) is already wired up from the cloud session — falls back to garagePlaceholder. Background removal (RMBG-1.4 via @huggingface/transformers) was already built in the cloud session and works. npm install was needed locally (package was in package.json but not installed).
